recommended_styles.reason: Soft pink gradient matches the dating scenario and is highly wearable for the target persona.
Nude pearly finish offers broad appeal and strong low-risk try-on conversion potential.
Elegant pink-nude line detail creates a slightly upgraded look without losing daily wearability.

campaign_message.headline: 约会氛围感美甲，一试就心动
campaign_message.subheadline: 优先推荐温柔粉调与裸色珠光款，适合通勤后直接赴约。

operator_actions: Place style_10 and style_23 in the first recommendation row for dating-intent users.
Use soft pink and nude visual framing in the banner creative.
Push try-on first instead of direct purchase messaging.
risk_notes: style_25 is more playful and student-oriented; it may weaken the consistency of a young-professional dating campaign.
strategy_summary: Use soft elegant mid-price styles to maximize try-on willingness for young-professional dating traffic.
